CHECKLIST 1 - ELEMENTS OF A HIGH-CONVERTING LANDING PAGE
2	Stefan Georgi
Attention bar calling out
avatar or creating urgency
Strong
benefit-driven headline
Supporting subhead
that highlights more
benefits or overcomes
an objection right away
Video intro (optional)
or creative product
stack/image in header
ELEMENTS OF A HIGH-CONVERTING
LANDING PAGE
Top navigation bar
and company logo if
running on Facebook 	===
===
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

3	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 1 - ELEMENTS OF A HIGH-CONVERTING LANDING PAGE
Logo bar/
credibility builder
Strong lead with its own
headline, highlighting
pain points and
promising a solution
Social proof elements -
screenshots of reviews,
text testimonials,
video testimonials

without price

why existing solutions
